story.text:
# ✨ Message Across
**☤ → 📨 → 🌐 → 📬**
*caducea · messaging · V0-conventional*

Walk a message between staff instances when a Mage holds multiple Hermes-class staffs across substrates. The cross-platform messenger discipline.

> The herald carries messages between addresses. The carrying is the work of the staff that does not dwell.

*Keywords:* message · cross-platform · Hermes-class · herald · peripatetic
